_comment: Schema for status effects — buffs, debuffs, DoTs, auras. One file per effect in status-effects/.
tags: string — e.g. dot, fire, slow, heal, shield
flags: no_move | no_action | no_cast | no_sprint — behavioral constraints that don't map to stats. Omit or leave empty if none.

instant: tag — any ability with this tag instantly removes this effect
gradual: tag — any DoT with this tag reduces duration per tick

effects.stat: string — e.g. hp, attack, speed, defense

notes: string — optional design intent or balance notes
